description:
Create snippets of text for support responses, sales outreach, or even common emails and save them in TextExpander.


What's new in TextExpander 8.4.2
New Features
- Dark Mode: Added dark mode support for the Windows app. The app detects your Windows system theme and applies dark mode to main windows and fill-in dialogs. Note: menu bar, task dialogs, and some secondary UI elements are not yet supported.
Improvements
- Request Snippet Changes: You can now suggest specific content when requesting new snippets or edits to existing snippets. The app now shows you how, and takes you there.
Bug Fixes
- Fixes related to fill-in window behavior and keyboard navigation of fill-in windows.
- Multiple other bug fixes.
